tasks.title: Define design tokens and global CSS foundation
tasks.description:
Create the foundational design system by updating the Tailwind configuration and global CSS to match the 'Architectural Monolith' design language from docs/design/stitch.

Work to do:
- Update `frontend/src/styles/global.css` with the new design system foundations
- Add custom Tailwind theme tokens via CSS custom properties or Tailwind v4 theme config: colors (pure black #000000, white #FFFFFF, grays #5e5e5e, #777777, surface hierarchy #F3F3F4 through #DADADA, error #ba1a1a), font families (Inter for all text, JetBrains Mono for code/data), and spacing tokens
- Override all borderRadius values to 0px (except 'full' at 9999px) to enforce the zero-radius principle
- Add typography utility classes for the design system scale: display-large (3.5rem/800), headline-large (2rem/700), title-medium (1.125rem/600), body-large (1rem/400), label-medium (0.75rem/700/uppercase/tracking-wide), label-small (0.7rem/700/uppercase)
- Set all transitions to 'none' for instant feedback (no easing/animations)
- Add custom scrollbar styles: 4px width, black thumb, white track
- Import Google Fonts: Inter (400-900) and JetBrains Mono
- Import Material Symbols Outlined icon font
- Ensure the dark mode custom variant `@custom-variant dark` still works with the new color tokens (dark = inverted: black bg, white text/borders)

Acceptance criteria:
- All design tokens (colors, fonts, radii, spacing) are defined and available as Tailwind utilities
- Zero border-radius is enforced globally
- Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts load correctly
- Material Symbols Outlined icons are available
- Dark mode inversion works (black ↔ white swap)
- No visual regressions in existing component rendering (components will still use old classes but the foundation is ready)
- Custom scrollbar styling is applied

tasks.title: Redesign DashboardLayout and header
tasks.description:
Restyle the main DashboardLayout component (`frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx`) to match the monolith design system.

Work to do:
- Update the layout structure: fixed left sidebar (16rem/256px width, full height), top header spanning remaining width (h-16/64px), main content area with left margin of 16rem and top padding of 64px
- Restyle the header: remove rounded corners, shadows, and colorful accents. Use 1px black bottom border, white background, pure black text. In dark mode: black background, white text, 1px white bottom border
- Update the mobile hamburger menu button styling: black icon on white, no rounded corners
- Restyle the user email display and Sign Out button to match: black text, no background decorations, uppercase labels where appropriate
- Remove all box-shadow usage from the layout
- Ensure skip-to-main-content accessibility link is preserved
- Maintain all provider wrapping (AuthProvider, ThemeProvider, ToastProvider, ErrorBoundary)

Acceptance criteria:
- Layout matches the fixed sidebar + header + content area pattern from designs
- Header uses 1px borders instead of shadows
- All colors follow the black/white binary system
- Dark mode correctly inverts (black bg, white borders/text)
- Mobile responsive layout still functions
- All accessibility features preserved

tasks.title: Redesign Sidebar navigation
tasks.description:
Restyle the Sidebar component (`frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx`) to match the monolith navigation design from the design references.

Work to do:
- Update sidebar container: white background (dark: black), 1px black right border (dark: white), full height, fixed width 16rem
- Restyle navigation items: default state = gray text (#777777), no background; hover = black text, light background (#F3F3F4); active = black background, white text with 4px left black border accent
- Make nav item labels uppercase, bold, small size (~12px), with wide letter-spacing (0.05em)
- Update icons to use Material Symbols Outlined at 20px with 12px gap from text (or keep current SVG icons but ensure consistent 20px sizing)
- Remove all rounded corners from nav items and sidebar container
- Remove all shadows and color accents (no blue highlights)
- Update mobile drawer: slide from left, 1px black border, same styling as desktop sidebar, overlay with opacity
- Ensure vertical padding 12px, horizontal padding 32px on nav items
- Dark mode: black background, white text/borders, active item = white background with black text

Acceptance criteria:
- Sidebar matches the monolith design: clean, sharp, black/white
- Active nav item clearly indicated with black fill + 4px left border
- Hover states use instant transitions (no easing)
- Mobile drawer matches desktop styling
- All 8 navigation items properly styled
- Dark mode inversion works correctly

tasks.title: Redesign ThemeToggle component
tasks.description:
Restyle the ThemeToggle component (`frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx`) to match the monolith design system.

Work to do:
- Remove rounded corners from toggle button and dropdown
- Use 1px black border on button and dropdown container
- Dropdown items: black text on white, hover = black background with white text
- Active theme indicator: black dot or checkmark, no colored backgrounds
- Remove all shadows from dropdown
- Ensure instant transitions (no easing animations)
- Icons should be monochrome (black in light mode, white in dark mode)
- Dark mode: invert all colors (white borders/text on black background)

Acceptance criteria:
- Toggle button and dropdown have zero border-radius
- Colors follow black/white binary system
- No shadows or color accents
- Dropdown opens/closes with instant transition
- Theme switching still works correctly for light/dark/system modes
- Dark mode styling is properly inverted

tasks.title: Redesign LoginPage and LoginForm
tasks.description:
Restyle the login components (`frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx` and `frontend/src/components/LoginForm.tsx`) to match the monolith design aesthetic.

Work to do:
- Update LoginPage container: clean white background (dark: black), centered content, generous whitespace
- Update LoginForm: remove all rounded corners from inputs, buttons, and card container
- Input fields: 1px black border, no border-radius, focus state = 2px black border or outline. Labels above inputs in uppercase, small (12px), bold, wide tracking
- Primary submit button: black background, white text, 0px radius, padding 1.4rem horizontal / 0.85rem vertical, active state = scale(0.98)
- Error messages: use #ba1a1a color, no rounded alert boxes
- Remove all shadows and blue accent colors
- Add editorial-style heading for the login page (large, bold, tight tracking)
- Dark mode: invert (white borders/text on black bg, white button with black text)

Acceptance criteria:
- Login form follows zero-radius, no-shadow design principles
- Input fields have proper focus states with black borders
- Submit button matches monolith primary button spec
- Error validation still works and displays correctly
- Form submission and authentication flow unaffected
- Dark mode properly inverted
- Responsive layout maintained

tasks.title: Redesign OverviewPage (dashboard home)
tasks.description:
Restyle the OverviewPage (`frontend/src/components/pages/OverviewPage.tsx`) to match the admin dashboard design reference (admin_dashboard_posts_uber_style).

Work to do:
- Update page heading: large display text (3.5rem, weight 800, tight tracking), uppercase section label above it (0.75rem, bold, wide tracking)
- Restyle stat cards: remove rounded corners and shadows, use 1px black borders on all sides. Large number (text-4xl, bold, tracking-tight) with small uppercase label above (10px, widest tracking). Create bordered grid cells mimicking spreadsheet style
- Health status badge: black/white binary (no colored backgrounds), use simple text or dot indicator
- Recent logs section: table with black header row (white uppercase text), 1px borders between rows, monospace font for timestamps and IDs
- Use 2-column layout pattern: 8-col main content + 4-col sidebar panels on large screens
- Remove all colored accent backgrounds (blue, green, purple, yellow stat cards)
- Quick actions: black primary buttons, secondary buttons with 1px black border
- Dark mode: invert all colors

Acceptance criteria:
- Overview page matches the editorial/monolith aesthetic
- Stat cards use bordered grid cells with large numbers and small labels
- Tables use black header with white text
- No rounded corners, shadows, or colored accents
- Layout uses proper grid (12-column system)
- All data still loads and displays correctly from API
- Dark mode inversion works
- Responsive behavior maintained for mobile

tasks.title: Redesign CollectionEditorPage and schema components

- `schema/ApiPreview.tsx` - API endpoint preview
- `schema/AuthFieldsDisplay.tsx` - auth fields display
- `schema/AuthSettingsEditor.tsx` - auth settings

Work to do:
- Use the form layout pattern: 12-column grid, left column (4 cols) for section labels/descriptions, right column (8 cols) for form inputs
- Number sections (01. General, 02. Fields, etc.) with editorial typography
- All inputs: 1px black border, 0px radius, focus = 2px border
- Section dividers: 1px black horizontal lines

Acceptance criteria:

- All schema editing functionality preserved

tasks.title: Redesign toast notifications and error boundary
tasks.description:
Restyle the toast/notification system (`frontend/src/lib/toast/ToastContainer.tsx`, `ToastContext.tsx`) and error boundary (`frontend/src/lib/error-boundary/ErrorBoundary.tsx`) to match the monolith design.

Work to do:
- Toast notifications: remove rounded corners, use 1px black border, white background, black text. Error toasts use #ba1a1a border/icon. No shadows, instant appear/disappear (no slide animation)
- Toast container positioning: maintain top-right or adjust to match design
- Error boundary fallback UI: clean editorial typography, 1px bordered container, black/white color scheme
- Dark mode: invert all

Acceptance criteria:
- Toasts are sharp-cornered and border-based
- Error/success/warning toast variants use appropriate design tokens
- No animations on toast appearance
- Error boundary displays properly styled fallback

- Dark mode works

tasks.title: Cross-component consistency audit and polish
tasks.description:
Perform a comprehensive visual audit across all restyled components to ensure consistency and fix any remaining styling issues.

Work to do:
- Verify all components use consistent border widths (1px), colors (black/white binary), and spacing
- Ensure no remnant rounded corners (grep for 'rounded' in all component files, replace with sharp corners)
- Ensure no remnant shadows (grep for 'shadow' in component files, remove all box-shadows)
- Verify all buttons follow primary/secondary/tertiary patterns consistently
- Check all tables have consistent header/row styling
- Verify all inputs have consistent border/focus/label styling
- Ensure all uppercase labels have consistent tracking and size
- Verify monospace font is used for all technical data (IDs, timestamps, URLs, code)
- Test dark mode on every page to ensure proper inversion
- Test responsive breakpoints on all pages (mobile, tablet, desktop)
- Verify accessibility: color contrast ratios meet WCAG AA, focus indicators visible, ARIA attributes preserved
- Fix any visual inconsistencies found

Acceptance criteria:
- Zero instances of border-radius (except full circles) across all components
- Zero box-shadows in any component
- Consistent button, input, table, and label styling across all pages
- Dark mode works on every page without visual bugs
- Responsive layout functions on mobile, tablet, and desktop
- WCAG AA contrast requirements met
- All interactive elements have visible focus indicators
- No functional regressions in any feature

summary: UI Style Redesign: Transform the Zerobase dashboard from its current rounded, colorful, shadowed Tailwind design to the 'Architectural Monolith' brutalist aesthetic defined in docs/design/stitch. The plan has 4 phases: (1) Define design tokens and global CSS foundation with new color palette, typography, and zero-radius principles; (2) Restyle core layout components (DashboardLayout, Sidebar, ThemeToggle, LoginPage); (3) Restyle all page-level components and their sub-components (Overview, Collections, CollectionEditor with schema components, RecordsBrowser with record components, Logs, Backups, Settings, AuthProviders, ApiDocs, Webhooks); (4) Polish toast/error components and perform a cross-component consistency audit. The redesign covers 25+ components across the frontend, transforming colors to a black/white binary system, removing all border-radius and shadows, applying editorial typography with Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, and ensuring dark mode works as a clean inversion.
